BIDS ON OLIVE Az. BRID i

City Officials to Settle Disp


Comparisons Of Cost.

pages.raw_text:
: According to members of the city
council and city officials today, the
Olive avenue bridge question has
resolved itself into a test Of the
relative cost of concrete and steel
bridge construction. The test will
be made on the Olive avenue bridge
by referring 1t back to the board
of public works for Reimbursement
on the basis of concrete eonstruc-
ton


The general Impression about
the city hall this forenoon seemed
to be that the city council would
take such action at it's meeting
as a committee Of the whole to-
night. With bids on steel construc-
ton IN hand the receipt Of bids on
concrete construction will give the
city council a better idea of the
relative cost of the two materials
in bridge construction than any
thing that has SO far presented
itself.


The discussion Of the Olive
avenue bridge proposition has
stirred up the liveliest mess that
has occupied the attention of the
city fathers since the grade sepa-
ration fight.





1t has reached the stage where
personalities are bling INDUCED in
and aspersions cast on the motives
of some of the leaders in the
fight. On this account the meet.
